name: Codfish with Couscous - Bsnx01a
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Atlantic cod, haddock or whiting filets
recipeInstructions:
1. Choose an oven-proof dish that the cod fillets will fit into snugly.
2. In a bowl, combine olive oil, lemon juice, prepared mustard, ground cumin, paprika, salt, black pepper, celery seeds, coriander, and ginger. Brush this mixture on both sides of the cod fillets and place them in the dish.
3. Bake at 375°F for 15 minutes.
4. Meanwhile, bring water and orange rind to a boil in a saucepan. Stir in couscous and cover. Set aside for 5 minutes, stirring well. Mix in chick-peas and pimento.
5. Arrange the couscous on a serving dish and top with cod fillets, spooning any cooking juices over the fish. Makes 4 servings.
